name: mondial2026
description: מערכת ניחושי מונדיאל 2026 לחברה - React + Node + MySQL 8 (root workspace)

scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev && npm --prefix server install --include=dev && npm --prefix client install --include=dev
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.full_vps_deploy: npm run install:all && npm run db:init && npm run db:seed && npm run client:build && bash -lc 'if command -v pm2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then pm2 restart Mondial-2026 --update-env; else echo "pm2 not installed, skipping restart"; fi'
scripts.prod: npm run client:build && npm run server
scripts.all: npm run setup && npm run dev
